title: gastrocotyle macedonica
intro: Gastrocotyle macedonica, also known as Macedonian stomachwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Balkan Peninsula and Greece, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antihistaminic effects. The health benefits of Gastrocotyle macedonica include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and alleviating symptoms of allergies and asthma. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
